constraints.name: validSeverity
constraints.message: Severity must be info, warning, or critical

value.value: Severity must be info, warning, or critical
Warning must be acknowledged before resolving
Only critical warnings can be escalated
Already-acknowledged warnings do not need escalation

policies.name: AllergenStaffCanView
policies.message: Kitchen staff can view allergen warnings

policies.name: AllergenLeadsCanAcknowledge
policies.message: Only leads and managers can acknowledge allergen warnings

policies.name: AllergenManagersCanOverride
policies.message: Only managers can override allergen warnings
